metadata.description: Integration Service API Workflow for the Stakeholder-Parent 'Stakeholder Onboarding' stage. Registers an affected provider customer and pulls its Business Associate Agreement reference. DEPLOY-TIME NOTE: the Data Fabric reads (qem:Provider[slug=<provider_slug>], qem:BAA[providerSlug=<provider_slug>]) are resolved at deploy via 'uip api-workflow registry stub'; here the output is shaped deterministically (no random) from the workflow inputs by a JavaScript/Assign activity.

script.code: var slug = String($workflow.input.provider_slug || $workflow.input.stakeholder_id || 'northstar').toLowerCase(); var names = { northstar: 'Northstar Regional Health', alpha: 'Alpha Academic Medical Center', beta: 'Beta Community Hospital', gamma: 'Gamma Health Partners', delta: 'Delta Surgical Institute', epsilon: "Epsilon Children's Hospital" }; var scopes = { northstar: '7-hospital system BAA covering pricing-engine and payment-network services', alpha: 'urban academic medical center BAA covering inpatient and research data flows', beta: 'rural community hospital BAA covering outpatient and ED claim flows', gamma: 'multi-state for-profit chain BAA covering cross-jurisdiction claim flows', delta: 'specialty surgical center BAA covering perioperative claim flows', epsilon: "children's hospital BAA covering pediatric claim flows" }; var display = names[slug] || 'the affected provider'; var scope = scopes[slug] || 'provider BAA covering claim and remittance flows'; return { stakeholder_id: $workflow.input.stakeholder_id || slug, baa_id: 'BAA-' + slug.toUpperCase(), onboarding_status: 'registered', registered_scope: 'Registered ' + display + '; pulled ' + scope + '.' };
